# GSD Report — Copilot Instructions

This is a personal productivity dashboard. See [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) for full agent instructions, available skills, and project structure.

## Skills

- **Setup** — Read `.claude/skills/setup/SKILL.md` and follow the instructions to set up the app
- **Generate Report** — Read `.claude/skills/gsd/SKILL.md` and follow the instructions to collect data and generate a report

The skill files describe what data to collect and what format to produce. Use whatever integrations you have available (CLI tools, APIs, built-in connectors) to access each data source.
